name: Bristling Spines (Moderate)
description:
Your exposed skin is covered in fine, needle-like hairs that you can flick into the eyes of enemies.

Activate—Urticating Burst 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You flick tiny spines in a , dealing |options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in the area with a save. On a critical failure, the creature is also until the end of their next turn.
